deleteModal.title: Delete asset
deleteModal.noPermissionMessage: You need MANAGE permission on the home building to delete this asset. Only the home building owner can delete assets.
deleteModal.warningMessage: This will permanently delete the asset from the system. This action cannot be undone.
deleteModal.noteDevicesDetached: • All attached devices will be automatically detached
deleteModal.noteAwayFromHome: • Asset is currently away from home location
deleteModal.confirmPrompt: Type the asset name "{{name}}" to confirm deletion.
deleteModal.confirmHelp: This ensures you're deleting the correct asset.
deleteModal.noOwnerError: Cannot delete: asset has no home owner

typeModal.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this asset type. Assets currently using this type will have their type reference removed.
typeModal.confirmHelp: Existing assets will remain but will no longer have a type assigned.

propertyModal.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete this property definition. If any asset types reference this field, deletion will be blocked by the server.
propertyModal.confirmHelp: Asset types using this field will need to be updated.
